definition:
1. roaming about for pasture : οἱ Νομάδες roaming, pastoral tribes, Nomads , (Herdotus Historicus), attic; and as proper noun, Numidians , (Polybius Historicus) 
2. feminine adjective grazing, feeding, at pasture , (Sophocles Tragicus) 
3. metaphorically, κρῆναι νομάδες wandering  streams, (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
